content:
I Go To Extremes – Billy Joel

Intro:
[ch]Bb[/ch]                  [ch]F/A[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]Bb[/ch]                  [ch]F/A[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]

Verse 1:
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]F/C[/ch]                [ch]F/C[/ch]                                        [ch]C[/ch]
Call me a joker,call me a fool.Right at this moment I'm totally cool.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]F/A[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
Clear as a crystal, sharp as a knife.  I feel like I'm in the prime of my life.[/tab]

Pre-Chorus:
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                  [ch]F/A[/ch]                                   [ch]C/G[/ch]                           [ch]D7/F#[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]
Sometimes it feels like I'm going to fast I don't know how long this feeling will last.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
Maybe it's only tonite.[/tab]

Chorus:
[tab]           [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]F/A[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Csus4[/ch]
Darling I  don't know why     I go to extremes.[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]F/A[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Csus4[/ch]
Too high or too low there ain't no in betweens.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb6[/ch]        [ch]A7[/ch]     [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]Dm/E[/ch]    [ch]Fm[/ch] 
And if I stand or I fall, it's all or nothing at all.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]F/A[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Csus4[/ch]
Darling I  don't know why     I go to extremes.[/tab]

Verse 2:
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]F/C[/ch]                   [ch]F/C[/ch]         
Sometimes I'm tired, sometimes I'm shot, sometimes I don't[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]                  
know how much more I've got.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]         [ch]C/E[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
Maybe I'm headed over the hil, Maybe I've set myself up for the kill.[/tab]

Pre-Chorus:
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                                  [ch]F/A[/ch]                    [ch]C/G[/ch]                      [ch]D7/F#[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]
Tell me how much do u think u can take, until the heart in u is starting to break?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
Sometimes it feels like it will.[/tab]

Chorus:
[tab]           [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]F/A[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Csus4[/ch]
Darling I  don't know why     I go to extremes.[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]F/A[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Csus4[/ch]
Too high or too low there ain't no in betweens.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb6[/ch]             [ch]A7[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]Dm/E[/ch]           [ch]Fm[/ch] 
You can be sure when I'm gone,I won't be out there too long.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]F/A[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Csus4[/ch]
Darling I  don't know why     I go to extremes.[/tab]


Bridge:
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
Out of the darkness, into the light, leaving the scene of the crime.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Fsus4[/ch]
Either I'm wrong or I'm perfectly right every time.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch] – [ch]F/C[/ch] – [ch]F/A[/ch] – [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]C/E[/ch]           
Sometimes I lie awake night after night, coming apart at the [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
seams.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch] – [ch]F/G[/ch] – [ch]F/A[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
Eager to please, ready to fight why do I go to extremes.[/tab]

Piano interlude:
[ch]Bb[/ch]                  [ch]F/A[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]Bb[/ch]                  [ch]F/A[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]

Chorus*:
[tab]         [ch]Bb6[/ch]        [ch]A7[/ch]     [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]Dm/E[/ch]    [ch]Fm[/ch] 
And if I stand or I fall, it's all or nothing at all.[/tab]

Darling I  don't know why     I go to extremes.[/tab]

Darling I  don't know why     I go to extremes.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]F/A[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Csus4[/ch]
Too high or too low, there ain't no in-betweens.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb6[/ch]             [ch]A7[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]Dm/E[/ch]           [ch]Fm[/ch] 
You can be sure when I'm gone,I won't be out there too long.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]F/A[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Csus4[/ch]
Darling I  don't know why     I go to extremes.[/tab]

Outro:
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                  [ch]F/A[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
                         I don't know why, I don't know why![/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                  [ch]F/A[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
                         I don't know why. I don't know why![/tab]

[ch]Bb[/ch]                  [ch]F/A[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]  X5
